textByHash.3f7ee94c819317fcb2bfb32e8c561af0ec02faa0: Fancy that! You're in luck, he's in the next room.
textByHash.b1ab36df60156238a86935c81fe79dcb9fd9b215: Hmm, well, he's a sensible bunny, I'm sure he'd love to go carrot bowling!
textByHash.ff4bb2281ab71ac0247cec40467c9da660e7860b: It just so happens we have a carrot bowling alley right here in the Rabbit Hole!
textByHash.149ac80358ff66792f8b4eb2771961b5f58806fa: Through the door to the east, turn left, then it's on the right. You can't miss it!
textByHash.0fe723cfbcdb0fdadfdc1e921265674688a7877d: Well, maybe you can. Depends on your navigational skills I suppose.
textByHash.b366bd714f98dd61f5d6119d3197876e59ac4e0d: Anyway, talk to Bowley Moley when you get there, I'm sure he will be happy to help.
textByHash.105b564b13440581276882315b968a2e55f98c01: Look who it is! I heard the Easter Bunny gave you a true thrashing on that alley.
textByHash.d72f9c547ee14ca9bb19c9721f950408ba3eb668: It seems to have lifted his spirits somewhat, thanks for doing that.
textByHash.29ed48e72ec745f5717a831fbeacf1cba754856d: Hey. I thought it was really sweet of you to help cheer up that bunny.
textByHash.f4e41d03948e81dc15b291bf5589fd44612f498c: Maybe we could go bowling sometime and you could cheer me up too?
textByHash.2eafe799852850c659958344fe6d07cab4c29b6e: Oh, I see. Nevermind then, if you're so busy.
